name: codex-hook-notify
description: Install and maintain CodexHookNotify email notifications for Codex Desktop Stop hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Send email when Codex Desktop finishes a turn.
interface.longDescription: Codex Hook Notify helps install a Windows-first SMTP email notifier for Codex Desktop Stop hooks. It guides setup without collecting SMTP secrets in chat.
defaultPrompt: Check my Codex email hook setup.
